package rulefixtures

import (
	gorm "gorm.io/gorm"
)

// scenario for updates_map_allocated_per_row: GORM Updates(map[string]...) maps allocated inside loops for per-row updates.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: data_access; severity: contextual.
type Rule303NegativeRecord struct { ID int }

func scenario303Negative(db *gorm.DB, ids []int) error {
	if len(ids) == 0 {
		return nil
	}
	return db.Where("id IN ?", ids).Limit(len(ids)).Find(&[]Rule303NegativeRecord{}).Error
}
